articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: France says cruise ship Andes virus matches known South American viruses - WTOP
articles.description: PARIS (AP) — France’s Pasteur Institute said it has fully sequenced the Andes virus detected in a French passenger from the MV Hondius cruise ship and found that it matched viruses already known in…
